💛 handmade friends 💛

meet my friends

  • Mama Moo

    loves nothing more than a picnic under a blue sky
  • Babushka Bunny

    a master at every craft: drawing, baking, knitting, etc.
  • Maxine

    a lucky goldfish who loves collecting various fruits for decoration
  • Mr. Duggy

    fluffy and friendly, you can find him anywhere there is cake
